_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in monitoring and optimizing system/server performance.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.538), AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.529).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.600). Shared vocabulary: [performance]. DCWF-only terms [monitoring, optimizing, server, skill, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, application, bottleneck, capacity, data, growth] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.909, R=0.889). P exceeds R by 0.020 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in monitoring and optimizing system/server performance." and "Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilizatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 ≈ STS 0.600 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [performance] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [performance]. DCWF-only: [monitoring, optimizing, server, skill, system]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, application, bottleneck, capacity, data, growth].
